# Rohaan Ashraf

> Software engineer running an independent practice. Builds production
> REST APIs, full-stack web applications, AI integrations, and custom
> CRMs for founders and product teams. Currently Associate Software
> Engineer at Infinitiv.AI. Available for client engagements each quarter.

## About

Rohaan Ashraf is a software engineer based remotely, taking on a small
number of outside engagements each quarter while working full-time at
Infinitiv.AI. The independent practice focuses on shipping software
that ages well: tested, documented, and reliable in production.

Core stack: Node.js, NestJS, Express, TypeScript across MERN and MEAN.
PostgreSQL or MongoDB for data. React and Next.js on the front end when
the engagement requires it. Python on hand for AI and data work.

## Services offered

- **REST APIs and server-side services** — production backends on Node.
  Authentication, webhooks, third-party integrations. Typical
  engagement: 2 to 6 weeks.
- **AI integrations** — GPT-backed automations, NLP on real product
  data, AI-assisted internal tools. Typical engagement: 1 to 4 weeks.
- **Full-stack web applications** — React or Next.js on the front,
  Node.js underneath, deployed to Vercel or comparable. Typical
  engagement: 4 to 10 weeks.
- **Custom CRMs** — bespoke customer-relationship and invoicing
  systems for teams that have outgrown spreadsheets. FBR-compliant
  tax flows available. Typical engagement: 4 to 8 weeks.

## Selected work

- **FirstAidTag** (firstaidtag.ca) — AI-powered medical-health band,
  Node service with Python AI layer, NFC sync, React Native client.
- **HelperHive** — on-demand services marketplace with real-time
  booking, role-based authentication, and NLP-powered chat.
- **FBR Compliance CRM** — automated tax and invoicing system aligned
  with FBR regulations, with analytics dashboards over heavy
  transaction data.
- **SmartFormGen** — browser-based automation that parses web forms
  and drafts intelligent fills via GPT.
- **CorexTech Email Platform** — server-side integrations and reusable
  modules for a cross-platform email-marketing automation product.

## How to engage

- Email: roaan.dev@gmail.com
- GitHub: github.com/rohaan1829
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/rohaanmughal
- Portfolio: https://roaan.dev

Replies typically within two working hours.

A useful first message tends to include:
1. A sentence or two on what you're building.
2. A rough timeline.
3. The stack, or what you're considering.
4. A link to anything that already exists (Figma, repo, brief).
